title: Patient Summary
description: Generate an International Patient Summary (IPS) — a standardized health record you can share with healthcare providers.
whatIsIpsDetail: An International Patient Summary is a minimal, portable health record following the HL7 FHIR standard (ISO/EN 27269). It contains essential clinical information for cross-border or cross-provider care.

form.namePlaceholder: As it should appear on the summary
form.namePrivacy: Your name is only included in the exported file — it is not stored or sent to our servers.

export.pdfDescription: Human-readable summary for sharing with providers
